name: interview-iq
description: AI-powered interview question generator for HR teams (Gemini 2.0 Flash).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.test:watch: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run test:watch -w server" "npm run test:watch -w client"
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage -w server && npm run coverage -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
